title: core
text:
source

markdown_to_pandas

 markdown_to_pandas (md_table_str:str)

Convert a markdown table string to a pandas DataFrame.




Type
Details




md_table_str
str
The markdown table string to be converted.




md_table_str = """
| Name | Age | Occupation |
| ---- | --- | ---------- |
| John | 35  | Engineer    |
| Jane | 29  | Teacher     |
| Bob  | 42  | Doctor      |
"""


markdown_df = markdown_to_pandas(md_table_str)
markdown_df[markdown_df.Name == "Jane"]





  
    
      
      Name
      Age
      Occupation
    
  
  
    
      1
      Jane
      29
      Teacher
    
  





source


display_df

 display_df (df:pandas.core.frame.DataFrame, align:str='left')

Display a pandas DataFrame with specified alignment for the headers and all the cells.




Type
Default
Details




df
DataFrame

The DataFrame to be displayed.


align
str
left
Alignment for the headers and all the cells.




style_obj = display_df(markdown_df)
style_obj




  
    
       
      Name
      Age
      Occupation
    
  
  
    
      0
      John
      35
      Engineer
    
    
      1
      Jane
      29
      Teacher
    
    
      2
      Bob
      42
      Doctor

title: cjm-pandas-utils
text: This file will become your README and also the index of your documentation.

title: cjm-pandas-utils
text:
How to use

markdown_to_pandas

from cjm_pandas_utils.core import markdown_to_pandas


md_table_str = """
| Name | Age | Occupation |
| ---- | --- | ---------- |
| John | 35  | Engineer    |
| Jane | 29  | Teacher     |
| Bob  | 42  | Doctor      |
"""


markdown_df = markdown_to_pandas(md_table_str)
markdown_df.iloc[1]

Name             Jane
Age                29
Occupation    Teacher
Name: 1, dtype: object
